name: bears-app-based-workflow
description: Self-contained sequential app workflow plugin for constitution truth, research waves, plan microtasks, dev-stage functional graphs, task ledgers, instruction hardening, role-matched subagents, and lineage analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Sequential constitution, research, plan, graph, hardening, analysis, and subagent workflow.
interface.longDescription: Bears App-Based Workflow provides a self-contained application workflow: app constitution as the functional source of truth, research waves that explain constitution ids, sequential plan microtasks, a functional graph that models future app-dev work after planning, graph-linked task ledgers, read-only instruction hardening, role-matched subagent handoffs, implementation analysis, and automation-owned evidence handoff. The plugin artifacts do not depend on a specific host workspace instruction file or runtime service.
capabilities: Research waves mapped to constitution ids
Dev-stage functional graph from approved plan microtasks
Implementation analysis with exact broken links
defaultPrompt: Create or update the app constitution functional truth.
Research a wave and map every finding to constitution ids.
Plan the ready research wave as ordered microtasks.
Model approved plan microtasks in the functional graph.
Analyze lineage from constitution to research to plan to graph to dev.
